target: Extract the reusable host core from the bespoke launcher assumptions and align runtime paths to the new package boundaries.
invariants: Preserve the tmux-host repo structure under src/tmux_host/ and keep subsystem boundaries intact.
Do not reintroduce Dopemux-specific ownership into host core; Dopemux remains an integration profile.
Keep desktop, mobile, CLI, and tmux-native surfaces consuming the same derived state model where UI/state files are touched.
Do not broaden allowlists or mix unrelated cleanup into these packets.
Host core remains generic and profile-driven.
Do not let hard-coded Dopemux or CRM layout assumptions survive in core services.

commit.message: Extract reusable host core from bespoke launcher logic

steps.task: Document the host core boundary and identify the package seams where launcher behavior now belongs.
requirements: Keep architecture docs aligned to the external-host boundary.
Do not move Dopemux-specific behavior into core.

steps.task: Refactor CLI/core/shared paths so reusable host behavior is cleanly separated from one-off launcher assumptions.
requirements: Do not sneak profile data or adapter specifics into generic shared helpers.

steps.task: Add focused tests that prove the extracted host core no longer depends on bespoke launcher assumptions.
requirements: Keep tests targeted to package seams and generic behavior.
Do not test profile-specific migration here.
